title: AutoTree
description: AutoTree is a Minecraft plugin that automates tree harvesting, making wood collection faster and more efficient.
body:
AutoTree is a Minecraft plugin that automates tree harvesting, making wood collection faster and more efficient.

- ✅ One-block break: Break a single log block and the entire tree falls automatically.
- 🌿 Smart detection: Leaves remain untouched, preserving the natural look of your world.

**Key Features**

🌳 Automatic Tree Breaking
Break one log block and watch the entire tree structure collapse instantly. No more tedious block-by-block mining!

 🍃 Leaf Preservation
The plugin intelligently detects and preserves all leaf blocks, keeping your world's aesthetic intact while you collect wood efficiently.

⚡️ Performance Optimized
Lightweight and efficient code ensures minimal server impact while providing smooth gameplay experience.

🎯 Smart Tree Detection
Automatically identifies connected log blocks using advanced algorithms, ensuring complete tree removal with a single break.

 🔧 Easy Configuration
Simple configuration file allows you to customize the plugin behavior to match your server's needs.

 📦 Compatibility
Designed for Paper/Spigot 1.20.1 servers with full support for all vanilla tree types.

**Why use AutoTree?**

- ⚡️ Save time: Harvest entire trees in seconds instead of minutes.
- 🎮 Better gameplay: Focus on building and exploring instead of repetitive mining.
- 🌍 World-friendly: Leaves stay intact, maintaining your world's natural beauty.
- 🔧 Server-friendly: Optimized code ensures no lag or performance issues.

**How It Works**

Simply break any log block of a tree, and AutoTree will automatically detect and break all connected log blocks in the tree structure. Leaf blocks are automatically excluded, so you only collect wood while preserving the tree's foliage.

Perfect for survival servers, creative builds, and any Minecraft world where efficient wood collection matters!
